latest_wins.title: Staff-brief PDF quality lock (layout chrome)
latest_wins.detail: Rejected plain pandoc letters. Shared staff-brief layout (banner/meta/cards/intent) with per-desk colors. Re-shipped C5iSR Monthly Capital Council + Garmin strike package in polished HTML.

latest_wins.title: Per-desk PDF themes + auto-log ships (not all-Carnegie)
latest_wins.detail: Principal corrected: layout shared, palette desk-owned (Coach lime, PJ/Chaps USMC black-gold, Max navy/crimson/teal, Carnegie forest/gold). desk-themes.json + md-to-staff-brief inject; psa-send-pdf autologs fleet-accomplishments. Garmin strike tickets closed on Max side (Cursor/Kershaw owns code).
